summary: Cavallo BFB Poly Hoof Boot Pads, 6mm industrial-grade polymer insoles sold in pairs for BFB hoof boots sizes 7-10, providing shock absorption for therapy and turnout.
Cavallo BFB Pastern Wraps, soft neoprene wraps sold in pairs that protect pasterns and heel bulbs and improve fit under BFB hoof boots sizes 7-10.
Cavallo High Tenacity Protection Pads, Kevlar-type anti-abrasion insoles sold in pairs for use over metal shoes or studs, fitting hoof boots sizes 0-6.
Cavallo Comfort Pads, 5mm polymer shock-absorbing hoof boot insoles sold in pairs for all hoof boots sizes 0-6, suited to riding, turnout and rehab.
Cavallo CLB Mini Boot Replacement Straps, a package of 2 replacement Velcro straps for Cute Little Boots, available in Black or Bling.
Cavallo BFB High Tenacity Protection Pads, Kevlar-type anti-abrasion insoles sold in pairs for use over metal shoes or studs, fitting BFB hoof boots sizes 7-10.
Cavallo Simple Boot Replacement Straps, a package of 2 replacement Velcro straps for the Simple Hoof Boot.
Cavallo Simple/ELB/CLB Hoof Boot Buckle Straps, sold in pairs as a secure alternative to Velcro straps for muddy, snowy or weedy terrain.
Cavallo Trek/BFB 3M Reflective Straps, sold in pairs as replaceable Velcro closures that boost visibility in low-light or evening riding conditions.
Cavallo CLB Cushion Pads, 5mm microcellular foam insoles sold in pairs for Miniature horse boots sizes M1-M4, ideal for laminitis and rehab comfort.
Cavallo Trek/BFB Hoof Boot Buckle Straps, sold in pairs as a secure buckle alternative to Velcro straps for muddy, snowy or weedy terrain.
Cavallo Hoof Boot Cushion Pads, soft microcellular foam insoles in 5mm and 10mm sold in pairs for hoof boots sizes 0-6, ideal for acute laminitis and rehab.
